text.title: IndieHackers Build-in-Public Strategy Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply IndieHackers Build-in-Public Strategy end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: audit-account
step.action: Fill bio, link product, declare focus.

step.name: launch-monthly-cadence
step.action: Publish first monthly update; commit to cadence.

step.name: set-kpis-and-stop
step.action: Declare signups + replies + list-growth KPIs + 12-week gate.
